metadata.title: GPT Image 1.5 - AI Image Generator & Editor | Marble AI
metadata.description: GPT Image 1.5 by OpenAI. Flagship image generation model for high-quality image creation and precise editing with strong instruction following and improved text rendering. Supports both text-to-image and image-to-image.

items.title: What is GPT Image 1.5?
items.description: GPT Image 1.5 is OpenAI's flagship image generation model known for strong instruction following, improved text rendering, and high-quality output.

items.title: What generation modes does it support?
items.description: GPT Image 1.5 supports both Text To Image (generating images from text descriptions) and Image To Image (editing and transforming existing images).

items.title: What makes it different from other models?
items.description: GPT Image 1.5 excels at instruction following and text rendering, making it ideal for precise, text-heavy image generation and editing.

items.title: How accurate is the text rendering?
items.description: GPT Image 1.5 features improved text rendering with better accuracy, font reproduction, and natural placement compared to previous models.

items.title: Can I use it commercially?
items.description: Yes! All images generated or edited with GPT Image 1.5 through Marble AI come with full commercial rights.

items.title: Is it good for complex instructions?
items.description: Yes! GPT Image 1.5 is specifically designed for strong instruction following, handling complex and detailed prompts accurately.

cta.title: Ready to Try GPT Image 1.5?
cta.description: Experience OpenAI's flagship image generation model. Create precise visuals with strong instruction following.
